name: playwright-api-e2e-poc
description: Playwright API E2E Testing POC — REST + GraphQL with Allure reporting

scripts.test: npx playwright test; npx tsx scripts/generate-network-report.ts; npx tsx scripts/generate-full-report.ts
scripts.test:rest: npx playwright test tests/rest/; npx tsx scripts/generate-network-report.ts; npx tsx scripts/generate-full-report.ts
scripts.test:graphql: npx playwright test tests/graphql/; npx tsx scripts/generate-network-report.ts; npx tsx scripts/generate-full-report.ts
scripts.test:smoke: npx playwright test --grep @smoke; npx tsx scripts/generate-network-report.ts; npx tsx scripts/generate-full-report.ts
scripts.test:regression: npx playwright test --grep @regression; npx tsx scripts/generate-network-report.ts; npx tsx scripts/generate-full-report.ts
scripts.test:demo: npx playwright test --grep @demo; npx tsx scripts/generate-network-report.ts; npx tsx scripts/generate-full-report.ts
